overview: A simple single-page tool where a job seeker saves their profile once, then pastes any application question to get a suggested answer ready to copy into an ATS form.
features: Save your resume or profile once and it persists across reloads
Paste any application question and generate a suggested answer from your profile
One-click copy to clipboard with visual feedback
Recent answers list showing the last 5 generated answers
Responsive two-column layout that stacks on mobile
